text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her training, Special Week, looking
flustered, approaches me about something.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The others in my class have been getting better
and better lately.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can't lose to them! So I wanna train a little more
today!
choice_data_list:
Got it! Then let's do some more laps until you're
satisfied!
Don't get too excited, or you might overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I'm gonna do my best to produce some
good results!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue our training until the very last
minute.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Y-you were right... I think I got a little too worked
up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I need to cool myself down. Deep breaths... Phew... Fwaaah

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week appears to have calmed down, but I
still have to do something about her
overzealousness...
